description.ko: 첨단 건축물과 비에 젖은 도시의 분위기가 어우러진 미래형 대도시의 풍경을 담고 있으며, 화려한 네온 사인이 도시를 밝힙니다.
description.en: A breathtaking vision of a futuristic metropolitan landscape where high-tech architecture meets a rain-soaked urban atmosphere, illuminated by brilliant neon signs.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night, towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, flying cars weaving through neon-lit canyons, heavy rain reflecting vibrant magenta and cyan lights on wet asphalt, intricate mechanical details, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic, high contrast.
